story.text: Add relation-ledger.v0 holding relation_claim, relation_probe, consequence_receipt, model_candidate, and bucket_coherence_report, beginning with logged relation claims and consequence receipts rather than embeddings, which are admitted later once consequence-grounded relation data exists to train or evaluate against.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'model-free-mode' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.model-free-mode-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
